case_title: AVENI, JOANNA vs. LOGAN, GARY et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVENI, JOANNA AS TO DEFENDANT LOGAN, GARY BABAR, MONICA THAT BLUE PLACE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-19-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-20-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-29-1995
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT THAT BLUE PLACE
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-19-1995, CONTINUED TO JAN-11-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE FOR LOGAN & BABAR. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT(S) OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SELECT PANEL OF ARBITRATORS, REJECTION DATE MAR-11-1996
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT THAT BLUE PLACE

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-22-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-22-1996, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND AS TO WHY THERE IS NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AGAINST GARY LOGAN, AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR MONICA BABAR., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-15-1996 CONTINUED FROM JAN-22-1996 TO FEB-21-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVENI, JOANNA SERVED AUG-22-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOGAN, GARY
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF AVENI, JOANNA

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-11-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JAN-11-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AS TO WHY THERE IS NO ANSWER OR ENTRY OF DEFAULT. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. HEARING SET FOR JAN-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
